description: Order of payment in which Abū l-Faraj is instructed to pay 15 dirhams to the bearer, who is a plasterer (jabbās). The sum is also written in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals at the top. There is also a note in Arabic script on verso, unclear if/how related. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
